known_issues: Event photo upload/display is broken and persists across redeployments

existing_features.title: Fix the image rendering pipeline for portfolio photos so that images uploaded by organizers are correctly converted from the backend blob/Uint8Array format to a displayable base64 data URL or object URL in the PortfolioGallery and OrganizerCard components. The lightbox dialog must show the actual image instead of the 'Image Not Found' placeholder.

Fix the image rendering pipeline for event photos so that photos uploaded via EventPhotoUpload are correctly converted from the backend blob/Uint8Array format to a displayable base64 data URL or object URL in the EventPhotoGallery component and its lightbox dialog.

Audit and consolidate the image data conversion utility (Uint8Array/blob to base64 data URL or object URL) into a single shared helper function used by PortfolioGallery, PortfolioUpload, EventPhotoGallery, EventPhotoUpload, and OrganizerCard to ensure consistent and correct image rendering across all components.

projectName: Fix portfolio and event photo image display (Image Not Found)
